margin_product.reason: Official Margin status/position surfaces exist, but account eligibility, risk policy, lifecycle, and reconciliation are not wired.

contract_product.reason: No standard futures, perpetual, or options product line is exposed in the current official API profile.

official_sources.evidence: The public API material includes margin status/position surfaces, but this adapter only wires spot market data and spot private order/account runtime.

runtime_isolation: Do not route bitbank margin status, margin positions, leverage, or margin order lifecycle through the spot adapter until margin account eligibility, product metadata, signed readbacks, order lifecycle, and reconciliation are audited.
required_audit_gaps: margin account eligibility and permission guard
margin status and position parser fixtures
margin order lifecycle request specs and parsers
post-write readback/reconciliation and live dry-run gate
